title: Pepe Nero Large Granite Mortar and Pestle Set - Heavy Duty Stone Grinder Bowl, Non Slip Base (Black, 5.5")
description:
About this item
Premium Quality Granite Construction: Pepe Nero’s mortar and pestle set is made from 100% genuine black granite. Its heavy-duty design is ideal for grinding spices and herbs. It features a unique 5.5-inch authentic Mocajete Mexicano square stone bowl that stays put on your counter, has a 2-cup capacity to handle both large and small batches, and comes with a wide, easy-to-use hand grinder pestle for effective grinding.
Handy Seasoning & Spice Tools Included: Along with the pestle and mortar bowl, you get three useful cooking accessories: a garlic peeler to quickly peel garlic, an avocado slicer for making perfect guacamole slices, and a spatula to scoop everything up.
Ideal for Flavorful Cooking: This pestle and mortar set is great for preparing authentic, flavor-packed dishes like guacamole, spices, or any other dip or sauce. It has a non-porous surface to retain the full flavor of your ingredients
Easy to Clean: Since the stone grinder is made of natural granite, it doesn't soak up flavors, odors, or stains. To clean, rinse with soap and water and let it air dry.
Perfect Gift for Foodies: If you know someone who loves to cook with fresh ingredients, this molcajete bowl set is the perfect gift. It comes with useful accessories and suits both beginners and seasoned chefs.
reviews_5s:
When it comes to the culinary world, I have two true loves: guacamole and pesto. So, as a special Christmas gift to myself (because why not?), I invested in this Granite Mortar and Pestle. And boy, has it been a game-changer.

The sheer number of times I've whipped up my own guacamole and pesto with this beauty is unmatched. I've created enough batches of pesto to last me for the next year – and that's saying something! But don't think it's limited to just these two delights; this Mortar and Pestle has become a versatile and cherished addition to my kitchen.

Mashing avocado, garlic, and various leftover herbs is an absolute breeze with this tool. The garlic peeler is a lifesaver for effortlessly removing those pesky skins. What sets this Mortar and Pestle apart is its square shape, which adds a distinctive touch that I adore, it really helps me to grip the sides.

The accompanying spatula is a handy addition, and in my household, you can never have too many spatulas. It makes transferring the goodness into a mason jar or bowl an easy task, leaving no deliciousness behind. My only wish is that the bowl were a tad larger to accommodate a whole avocado, but it still gets the job done.

Having purchased this gem as a gift for others in the past, I can confidently say that everyone has been delighted with the product's performance and craftsmanship. If you're a fellow guacamole or pesto enthusiast, or just love to experiment in the kitchen, I wholeheartedly recommend this Mortar and Pestle. It's a kitchen essential that elevates your culinary adventures to the next levelThis fits in any setting, works well, I don't wash it, I was wipe it down with napkins & I add a little sea salt to it grind it & wipe it off again,... It's is as pictured, it last long,.. I've owned mines almost a year & it's still holding solid,... I definitely highly recommend,...I love that it has substantial weight to it, which keeps it from sliding around as you're really going to town on whatever you're mashing. Don't let the seasoning instructions intimidate you. It's a very easy process. A major selling point to this particular model is the cutting tool. My wife seriously cut her hand while cutting open an avocado. While in the ER, the nurse said avocados are the #1 thing people hurt themselves on in the kitchen. The knife works as shown in the video. My kids love making guacamole. This knife is a safe way for them to do it, or to just to enjoy avocados in general. The little rubber spatula is a nice feature that helps make sure you get every drop of your ingredients out of the mortar. The bowl is fairly substantial in size. Enough room to mash up 3 or 4 avocados at once. The pestle has substantial weight to it as well, which makes crushing things fairly effortless. One of those kitchen items that should last forever. If you don't have a lot of storage room, it's something you wouldn't mind keeping out on your kitchen counter or on top of your bar for muddling ingredients for cocktails. Definitely a good investment.Just received my order 8/10/20, and I am amazed at how fast it came, considering I ordered it late Tuesday night (8/8/20) and received it on Thursday morning - with no special rush put on it. This item was a gift for my daughter and she was absolutely delighted with it. We are very pleased with the quality and sturdiness of the pieces. We both loved the fact that it included the garlic peeler, spatula and avocado knife/scraper. Instructions (very clear and easy to follow) were included on how to “season” the mortar, which my daimmediately did, using the ingredients and method suggested on the included care card. We had been searching for quite some time for a good quality, reasonably priced mortar and pestle set, and this granite set was a great choice for us. Nice looking and functional! Can’t wait to see if the peeler really works like in the video - but that was not in any way, the deciding factor in purchasing this item, so we are not going to put any importance on it if it doesn’t work. Bottom line is that so far, we love it! This item is as described and we highly recommend purchasing it if you are looking for a quality mortar/pestle set. While this was a gift for my daughter, I have to say that it was so much better than I expected in looks and size.This is a perfect size for my needs. It is sturdy. It cleans really easily after you have seasoned it. It comes with the steps. I love this jewel. It allows me to make delicious food. It grinds well. I have a Vitamix blender. But when I am looking for a certain flavor, this beauty gets the job done!!The stone is great quality, and the little garlic peeler works great. I was skeptical at first but after getting used to it , it helps me prep them quickly.I love this thing!! love that the weight of it, helps to keep it in place when i'm using it. Classy appearance. Would buy again.It’s good for Indian pachadiI’m pleased with this mortar and pestle combo because of the extra utensils that accompany it. It is deceiving though in that the depicted size is larger than the actual size. It’s my first purchase and so for a starter I’m pleased. I will look for a larger one in the future.Grinding perfectly 👌
reviews_1s:
Edit- changed my review after couple of months since it broke in half.

Absolutely loved how sturdy it is and how well it's easy to use and maintain. I have had used it almost everyday since it arrived and no complaints so far. But will update the review after few months of usage.I used the way instruction says but every time the material is coming of, so you have to eat some grind stone with every dish you cook with this.Mine arrived broken and is going back!Low quality product , I returned it
